texto: To mock something is pure ignorance. Intelligent people even open themselves to things that they don't understand. […] When an ignorant praises something, it won't probably be something profound. Surely it can't be the Principle that guides us.
explicacao: Citação de Alfonso Colodrón sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “To mock something is pure ignorance. Intelligent people even open themselves to things that they …” articula reflexao, ignorance, mocking em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mocking.
